home.hero_subtitle: CyberAgent creates thousands of virtual AI agents that inhabit and animate physical robots and toys in the real world.
home.feature_agents_desc: Each agent has unique behavior trees defining personality, reactions, and movement patterns.
home.feature_robot_desc: Bridge virtual agents to physical hardware — RoboMaster, LEGO, and more.
home.feature_evolve_desc: Every day, autonomously review, iterate, and improve the platform.
home.agents_subtitle: Choose a character to bring to life
home.step_1_desc: Browse our gallery of unique virtual agents with distinct personalities.
home.step_3_desc: The robot comes alive as your chosen character at home.
home.cta_desc: Explore our agent gallery and find your perfect companion.
